headerDisplay: Homebridge plugin to open electric rim locks via Raspberry Pi GPIO pins.
footerDisplay: For documentation, see the [plugin homepage](https://github.com/roberto-montanari/homebridge-gpio-electric-rim-lock) on GitHub.

name.title: Name
name.description: Name of this platform in Homebridge

name.title: Door name
name.description: Name of the door lock shown in HomeKit

pin.title: GPIO pin number
pin.description: Physical GPIO pin connected to the relay

duration.title: Pulse duration (ms)
duration.description: How long the relay stays active to simulate button press (typically 500 ms)
